description: Project kickoff: agenda, definition of victory, deliverables, team, approach, comms.

fields.name: project_name
fields.guidance: The project's name — the big title.

fields.name: project_tagline
fields.example: Simulating the fleet transition to trolley-assist across three sites.
fields.guidance: One sentence: what the project does.

fields.name: dov_intro
fields.example: The project is a success when the client can make the transition decision with confidence.
fields.guidance: One sentence framing what success means.

fields.name: dov_points
fields.example: A validated simulation model of current haulage operations

fields.name: deliverables
fields.example: Simulation model with baseline and transition scenarios
fields.guidance: The contractual deliverables, one per bullet.

fields.name: team_members
fields.guidance: One bullet per person: Name — Role (org) — Allocation.

fields.name: approach_note
fields.example: Three sprints from data audit to scenario report, demos at each gate.
fields.guidance: One line summarising the delivery approach.

fields.name: milestones
fields.example: Sprint 1 (Weeks 1–2) — Data audit & model scaffold — Data-readiness memo
fields.guidance: One bullet per milestone/sprint: name (timing) — activities — deliverable.

fields.name: tracking_items
fields.example: Shared progress tracker updated every Friday

fields.name: closing_note
fields.example: Data access and site contacts unlock sprint 1 — here's what we need this week
fields.guidance: One-sentence closing framing the immediate asks.

fields.name: next_steps
fields.example: Data extract of 12 months' dispatch records — Sipho Dlamini — by Friday
fields.guidance: 3–5 action bullets with owners and dates.
